items.title: Building a system prompt
items.scenario: An assistant composes a system prompt from a base template plus user-supplied tools and persona.
items.explanation: Use an f-string or `''.join` over a list of sections; never `s += part` in a loop.

items.title: Joining streamed tokens
items.scenario: A streaming completion arrives as many small string chunks and you need the final text.
items.explanation: Collect into a list and call `''.join(parts)` once at the end — O(n) instead of O(n²).

items.title: Parsing a model response
items.scenario: An LLM returns `Answer: 42` (or JSON with extra prose); you need to extract just the answer.

items.title: Counting tokens, not characters
items.scenario: Estimating cost or fitting context for an OpenAI/Anthropic model.
items.explanation: `len(text)` counts code points; for tokens use the model's tokenizer (e.g. tiktoken). They are not interchangeable.
